title: Mexican Satay Chicken Tacos
description: A fusion of Mexican and Malaysian flavors in a crispy taco shell, filled with spicy chicken satay.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix together spicy peanut sauce and Malaysian satay seasoning.
Thread chicken breast onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the chicken with the peanut sauce mixture, making sure to coat evenly.
Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
Meanwhile, warm the taco shells according to package instructions.
Once the chicken is cooked, let it rest for a few minutes before slicing it into thin strips.
Assemble the tacos by placing a few slices of chicken into each shell, followed by a sprinkle of cilantro, diced red onion, and sliced radishes.
Serve immediately, with lime wedges on the side.
